title: solanum nigrum f. villosum
intro: Solanum nigrum f. villosum, also known as hairy black nightshade, is a plant species that is closely related to the common black nightshade (Solanum nigrum). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, Solanum nigrum f. villosum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to skin problems.
